description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style rifle with a distinctive geometric pattern in neon green lines over a dark, likely black, base color. The rifle features a compact design with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, characteristic of bullpup firearms. It has a fixed stock integrated into the main body, a prominent carrying handle with an integrated sight rail, and a detachable box magazine. The barrel is standard length and capped with a yellow muzzle device, possibly a flash hider or thread protector. The grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with neon green geometric patterns on a black body, featuring a fixed stock, carrying handle, and yellow muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, neon green pattern, fixed stock, carrying handle, and yellow muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, yellow muzzle device, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the geometric pattern, fixed stock, and magazine placement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, carrying handle, and the rifle's compact width.
